main.description: Check the authenticated viewer's membership status in an open-governance cooperative. The viewer's DID is implicit from the session.

cooperative.description: DID of the cooperative to check membership in.

isMember.description: Whether the viewer has an active membership in this cooperative.

status.description: Membership status, if a relationship exists.

roles.description: Roles assigned to the viewer via memberApproval authority. Only present when active.
